project.name: network-navigator
project.description: LinkedIn networking intelligence platform with contact enrichment, ICP scoring, and AI outreach

services.name: app
services.description: Next.js web dashboard for contact management, enrichment, scoring, and outreach

services.name: db
services.description: PostgreSQL with pgvector for contact storage, vector embeddings, and graph sync

services.name: docs
services.description: Fumadocs documentation site with configuration guides and API reference

notes: App and DB run via docker-compose. Docs site runs standalone on port 3001. Browser extension is built separately (cd browser && npm run build).
